boss.name: Arachna
boss.greeting:
You dare to step into my web?
[1] Attack
[2] Dodge
[3] Talk
boss.defeat_msg:
N-no... impossible...
You defeated me... the fear fades...
[E] Close
boss.dodge_msg:
Coward. You dodged... this time.
But the web is everywhere.
[E] Close
boss.talk_msg:
Words... How curious.
The fear has slightly receded.
[E] Close

ui.loot_heal:
You found bandages.
They have been added to your inventory [F].
